name: Green Bean Walnut & Feta Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds fresh green beans, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 4 quarts of water to a boil.
2. Add green beans and cook until tender-crisp about 4 minutes.
3. Drain well and immerse in ice water. Drain and pat dry.
4. Finely chop mint leaves.
5. Combine mint, oil, vinegar, salt, pepper, garlic in a processor and blend well.
6. Refrigerate the mixture.
7. Arrange beans in a shallow glass serving bowl.
8. Sprinkle with nuts and onions.
9. Just before serving, pour dressing over and toss.
